name: aero-productivity-suite
description: Root package for AERO productivity suite

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/tracking-service && npm install --prefix backend/realtime-service && npm install --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n "auth,track,real,gate,dash" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgYellow" "npm start --prefix backend/auth-service" "npm start --prefix backend/tracking-service" "npm start --prefix backend/realtime-service" "npm start --prefix backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
